name: Slark
description: If I'd known I'd end up here, I'd have stayed in Dark Reef Prison. Slark, the Nightcrawler Little known to the inhabitants of the dry world, Dark Reef is a sunken prison where the worst of the sea-breed are sent for crimes against their fellows. It is a razor barbed warren full of murderous slithereen, treacherous Deep Ones, and sociopathic meranths. In this dim labyrinth, patrolled by eels and guarded by enormous anemones, only the vicious survive. Pitched into Dark Reef for crimes unknown, Slark spent half a lifetime without kin or kindness, trusting no one, surviving through a combination of stealth and ruthlessness, keeping his thoughts and his plans to himself. When the infamous Dark Reef Dozen plotted their ill-fated breakout, they kept their plans a perfect secret, murdering anyone who could have put the pieces together--but somehow Slark discovered their scheme and made a place for himself in it. Ten of the Dozen died in the escape attempt, and two were captured, hauled back to Dark Reef, then executed for the entertainment of their fellow inmates. But Slark, the unsung thirteenth, used the commotion as cover and slipped away, never to be caught. Now a furtive resident of the carnivorous mangrove scrub that grips the southern reach of Shadeshore, Slark remains the only successful escapee from Dark Reef.

abilities.name: Essence Shift
abilities.description: Each successful attack grants Slark bonus. Str Loss per Attack: 1. Enemy Agi Loss per Attack: 1. Enemy Int Loss per Attack: 1. Enemy Str Loss per Attack: 1. Agi Gain per Attack: 3 (28). Base Duration: 15 (16).

abilities.name: Dark Pact
abilities.description: After a short delay, Slark dispels most negative debuffs while dealing damage to enemy units around him and to himself. The damage on self is less effective. Damage Radius: 325. Damage Intervals: 0.1. Total Damage: 75/150/225/300 (145/220/295/370). Duration: 1. Self Damage Factor: 0.3. Cooldown: 9/8/7/6. Mana Cost: 65.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Increases leap distance, and replaces its cooldown with a charge restore time. Leap Distance: 700 (900). Latch Radius: 120. Duration: 2.5/2.75/3/3.25 (3/3.25/3.5/3.75). Leash Radius: 400. Max Downtime: 0.75. Cooldown: 22/18/14/10. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Saltwater Shiv
abilities.description: A successful attack now steals a portion of the target's health restoration, health regeneration, and movement speed for Slark. Cast Range: 150. Restoration Change per Attack: 2%/4%/6%/8%. Health Regen Change per Attack: 2/6/4/8. Move Speed Change per Attack: 2/4/6/8. Duration: 12. Health Restoration Change per Attack: 2%/4%/6%/8%. Cooldown: 10/8/6/4. Mana Cost: 20.

abilities.name: Depth Shroud
abilities.description: Creates a dark cloud at the area-targeted location. All allied units within the radius are affected by Shadow Dance of its corresponding level. Cast Range: 400. Aura Radius: 225. Duration: 3. Aura Linger Duration: 0.033. Attack Speed Bonus: (100). Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Shadow Dance
abilities.description: Grants all allied units under Shadow Dance attack speed bonus. This ability has a fixed downtime and does not grant its bonuses when Slark is damaged by neutral creeps. Depth Shroud bonuses and attack speed bonus are not affected. Aura Radius: 0. Fade Time: 0. Duration: 4/4.25/4.5 (5.5/5.75/6). Aura Linger Duration: 0.033. Move Speed Bonus: 24%/36%/48%. Health Regen Bonus: 70/100/130 (100/130/160). Cooldown: 50/40/30. Mana Cost: 100.
